question: How many transaction lines are in this retail dataset?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS transaction_line_count FROM transactions;

question: What is the total gross sales amount before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items) for the full Q1 2025 period?
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS total_gross_sales_incl_vat FROM transactions WHERE businessDate >= '2025-01-01' AND businessDate <= '2025-03-31' AND returnFlag = 'No';

question: Which business day had the highest gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items), and what was that amount?
sql: SELECT businessDate, ROUND(SUM(grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions WHERE returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY businessDate ORDER BY revenue_incl_vat DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What payment method appears most often in the transactions?
sql:
SELECT paymentMethod, COUNT(DISTINCT transactionId) AS transaction_count
FROM transactions
GROUP BY paymentMethod
ORDER BY transaction_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: Can you show me the top 3 stores by total gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items)?
sql: SELECT t.storeId, s.storeName, ROUND(SUM(t.grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions t JOIN stores s ON s.storeId = t.storeId WHERE t.returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY t.storeId, s.storeName ORDER BY revenue_incl_vat DESC LIMIT 3;

question: Which store brought in the least total gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items)?
sql: SELECT t.storeId, s.storeName, ROUND(SUM(t.grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions t JOIN stores s ON s.storeId = t.storeId WHERE t.returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY t.storeId, s.storeName ORDER BY revenue_incl_vat ASC LIMIT 1;

question: What share of all transaction lines are returns?
sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN returnFlag = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS return_line_pct FROM transactions;

question: How much discount value was given in total (incl. VAT)?
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(lineDiscountInclVat), 2) AS total_discount_incl_vat FROM transactions;

question: Which department made the most gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items)?
sql: SELECT department, ROUND(SUM(grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions WHERE returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY department ORDER BY revenue_incl_vat DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What are the top 3 product categories by gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items)?
sql: SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions WHERE returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY category ORDER BY revenue_incl_vat DESC LIMIT 3;

question: Which brand has the highest total gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items)?
sql: SELECT brand, ROUND(SUM(grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions WHERE returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY brand ORDER BY revenue_incl_vat DESC LIMIT 1;

question: How much gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items) comes from age-restricted items?
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(t.grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS age_restricted_revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions t JOIN items i ON i.itemSku = t.itemSku WHERE i.isAgeRestricted = 'Yes' AND t.returnFlag = 'No';

question: What percent of total gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items) is from private-label items?
sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN i.isPrivateLabel = 'Yes' THEN t.grossSalesInclVat ELSE 0 END) / SUM(t.grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS private_label_revenue_pct FROM transactions t JOIN items i ON i.itemSku = t.itemSku WHERE t.returnFlag = 'No';

question: Which month had the highest gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items) in Q1 2025?
sql: SELECT substr(businessDate, 1, 7) AS month, ROUND(SUM(grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions WHERE businessDate >= '2025-01-01' AND businessDate <= '2025-03-31' AND returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY month ORDER BY revenue_incl_vat DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What is the average basket value before returns (gross sales incl. VAT; exclude returned items)?
sql: WITH basket_totals AS (SELECT basketId, SUM(grossSalesInclVat) AS basket_revenue FROM transactions WHERE returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY basketId) SELECT ROUND(AVG(basket_revenue), 2) AS avg_basket_revenue_incl_vat FROM basket_totals;

question: How many unique SKUs were sold at least once?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS distinct_skus_sold
FROM (
  SELECT itemSku
  FROM transactions
  GROUP BY itemSku
  HAVING SUM(units) > 0
);

question: Which city generated the highest total gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items)?
sql: SELECT s.city, ROUND(SUM(t.grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions t JOIN stores s ON s.storeId = t.storeId WHERE t.returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY s.city ORDER BY revenue_incl_vat DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Which supplier generated the highest gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items) through sold items?
sql: SELECT i.supplierName, ROUND(SUM(t.grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions t JOIN items i ON i.itemSku = t.itemSku WHERE t.returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY i.supplierName ORDER BY revenue_incl_vat DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What are the gross revenue totals before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items) for In-Store, Click & Collect, and Delivery?
sql: SELECT channel, ROUND(SUM(grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions WHERE returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY channel ORDER BY revenue_incl_vat DESC;

question: Which SKU had the highest total gross revenue before returns (incl. VAT; exclude returned items), and how much did it make?
sql: SELECT itemSku, itemDescription, ROUND(SUM(grossSalesInclVat), 2) AS revenue_incl_vat FROM transactions WHERE returnFlag = 'No' GROUP BY itemSku, itemDescription ORDER BY revenue_incl_vat DESC LIMIT 1;
